schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the seizure and impoundment of agricultural animals. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and all attachments

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents training required for animal control officers in Virginia. This series may include, but is not limited to: certificates of completion, class rosters, correspondence, and any attachments.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents completed annual survey responses submitted by local animal control units. This series may include, but is not limited to: surveys and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents annual animal custody summaries submitted by public and private animal shelters, humane societies, and rescue groups. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents livestock import permits that are provided to livestock owners and dealers by the State Veterinarian. This series may include, but is not limited to: applications and permits.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the issuance of civil penalty assessments to regulated entities or facilities due to violations found during inspections, including violations of mandated requirements. This series may include, but is not limited to: notices of violation and civil penalty matrices.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: documents all complaints received by the Department from individuals, businesses, government agencies, or on behalf of organizations. This series may include, but is not limited to: complaint forms, photos, and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents horses that have been tested and treated for Contagious Equine Metritis(CEM). This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the investigation of felony animal abuse and neglect. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports, photographs, scene sketches, and all attachments.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents dangerous dog information submitted by local animal control departments and dangerous dog owners. This series may include, but is not limited to: registration forms and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_title: Equine Infectious Anemia Test (Coggins) The series
series_metadata.series_description: documents testing on equine blood by the laboratory or veterinarian to determine whether a horse residing in Virginia has tested positive for Equine Infectious Anemia. This series may include, but is not limited to: laboratory test forms and attachments.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_title: Import and Export Certificates of Veterinary Inspection (CVI)
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the receipt of import and export certificates of veterinary inspection (CVI) for all livestock, domestic, and exotic animals, including poultry and other species. This series may include but is not limited to: certificates and rejection letters.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents letters sent to animal shelters upon an initial inspection and subsequent approval to operate. This series may include, but is not limited to: inspection forms and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: documents laboratory submissions, test results, and other information related to tests that are performed in the regional animal health laboratories. This series may include, but is not limited to: submission forms, test data, chain of custody forms, photographs, and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the yearly inspections by the agency's shelter inspector. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and correspondence.

schedule_metadata.agency_name: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Services

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the requests of vaccine companies for approval to distribute their product in the commonwealth, and the approval or denial by the State Veterinarian. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and correspondence.
